caption: In an indoor setting with a light-colored floor and a green rug, four ponies are gathered. A large light-blue pony with purple hair is partially visible on the right side of the scene. To the left, three smaller ponies—one orange with purple hair, one white with purple hair, and one yellow with pink hair—are sitting together on the rug. In the beginning, the three smaller ponies are smiling and looking up toward the blue pony. As the scene progresses, their expressions shift from happiness to skepticism. The white pony narrows its eyes, and the yellow pony adopts a stern, frowning expression, while the orange pony maintains a more neutral gaze. The characters remain in their seated positions throughout the sequence, with only their facial expressions changing to convey a shift in mood.
